mapper.select: SELECT s.*, c.name AS class_name, p.name AS parent_name FROM student s LEFT JOIN clazz c ON s.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN parent p ON s.parent_id = p.id ORDER BY s.id
SELECT s.*, c.name AS class_name, p.name AS parent_name FROM student s LEFT JOIN clazz c ON s.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN parent p ON s.parent_id = p.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student (name, gender, birthday, phone, class_id, parent_id, enroll_date, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{gender}, #{birthday}, #{phone}, #{classId}, #{parentId}, #{enrollDate}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE student SET name=#{name}, gender=#{gender}, birthday=#{birthday}, phone=#{phone}, class_id=#{classId}, parent_id=#{parentId}, enroll_date=#{enrollDate}, status=#{status} WHERE id = #{id}
